since_last: 34% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +3.90%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 34% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.37% · BTC +1.18% · Gold -0.56% · Nasdaq100 -0.19%. 34% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +3.90%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +3.90%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -3.08%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SPCX is the standout at -16.43%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +15.66%, VRT +7.48%, MU +6.82%, PWR +5.40%, LRCX +5.27%. Laggards: SPCX -16.43%, AVAV -10.78%, ARM -7.22%, PLTR -6.98%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -16.43% at $154.6
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -16.43% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
